blocks.text: Aspmyra into the history books — Glimt's greatest night begins

After Liverpool's shock defeat in Istanbul and Bayern's 6-1 demolition of Atalanta, Norwegian football takes centre stage. Bodø/Glimt host a Champions League knockout at Aspmyra — the biggest club game ever played on Norwegian soil.
🎮 01:00 — rain (FaZe) carries Norwegian CS2 hopes in ESL Pro League S22
⛳ Thu 05:00 — Hovland & Reitan tee off at THE PLAYERS Championship, TPC Sawgrass
